title: BNB Bridge - REKT
relevance_summary: Bridge withdrawal with compromised validator signatures

prevention.rule: Block any tx that mints large amounts of native token on the bridge contract.

summary: The BNB bridge was exploited to mint 2M BNB directly to the hacker's address, resulting in a loss of 586M USD. A critical vulnerability in the bridge's verification process allowed the attacker to forge proofs of deposit.
